teachings.teaching: The text presents a genealogical lineage by naming successive generations and their parentage.
It emphasizes continuity of identity and heritage across generations (i.e., tracing descent through named ancestors).
By recording specific names in sequence, it supports the broader purpose of linking a person to an established ancestral line.

goals.goal: To document and preserve a genealogical chain of descent by listing successive forefathers (Aram → Amminadab → Nahshon/Naassών → Salmon/Σαλμών).
